_publications._publicationTitle: Structural and functional analyses of a germline KRAS T50I mutation provide insights into Raf activation.

_contextSnippet: isolating EGFP+/mCherry+ cells by sorting to ensure uniform K-Ras expression upon dox treatment
details: Used to detect mCherry-tagged K-Ras proteins in coexpression studies and for cell sorting to ensure uniform K-Ras expression
